task_completion.description: Set the volume path to '/home/ga/Volumes/pim_volume.hc' and size to 15 MB
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard showing the file location set to '/home/ga/Volumes/pim_volume.hc' and the volume size set to 15 MB.

task_completion.description: Select AES encryption and SHA-512 hash algorithm
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard showing 'AES' selected in the Encryption Algorithm dropdown and 'SHA-512' selected in the Hash Algorithm dropdown.

task_completion.description: Enter the password and set the custom PIM to 10
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard (Volume Password step) showing the 'Use PIM' checkbox checked and the Volume PIM field explicitly set to '10'. The password field should have text or dots entered.

task_completion.description: Mount the newly created volume using the password and PIM
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window showing the volume '/home/ga/Volumes/pim_volume.hc' successfully mounted to a slot (e.g., /home/ga/MountPoints/slot3), or the mount dialog actively showing the PIM value '10' being entered during the mount process.

task_completion.description: Copy the SF312 Nondisclosure Agreement into the mounted volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal showing the file 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt' located inside the mounted volume's directory (e.g., /home/ga/MountPoints/slot3).
VeraCrypt main window showing that the previously mounted volume has been removed from the active slots list, indicating it was dismounted.

integrity.description: Agent used the VeraCrypt GUI to create and mount the volume
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual VeraCrypt graphical interface (Volume Creation Wizard, Mount dialogs) being used, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely copied the file into the volume
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager or terminal should show actual file copy operations into the mounted VeraCrypt directory, not just renaming a file elsewhere.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof the results in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected paths, PIM values, and success states should appear in the genuine VeraCrypt application windows and system file manager, not typed out in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected volume path is '/home/ga/Volumes/pim_volume.hc'. The volume size must be 15 MB. The expected password is 'StrongPIMtestPassword2024!' and the expected PIM is 10. The file to be copied into the volume is '/home/ga/Documents/SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt'.
